entries.summary: Phase 1 established repository baseline with a comprehensive .gitignore covering Swift/SwiftPM build artifacts, macOS system files, scraped website data, IDE files, Xcode artifacts, and Swarm operational files. The file was iterated once after reviewer caught a pattern anchoring issue (build/ → /build/) and missing Swarm operational file exclusions. All 24 git check-ignore verifications passed.
top_rejection_reasons: Unanchored directory pattern (build/ vs /build/) risked ignoring .swarm/evidence/build/
lessons_learned: Anchor directory patterns to repo root (e.g. /build/) when they could match subdirectories in tracked folders like .swarm/
Gitignore patterns for auto-generated operational files prevent dirty git state on every tool invocation
The critic gate caught an acceptance criteria gap (missing IDE patterns) before implementation began — gate paid for itself on a trivial task
